notes: Selectors discovered via DevTools and Playwright codegen on creator.xiaohongshu.com. data-v-* attributes are Vue scope IDs and may change on XHS frontend deploys — prefer text-based and data-placeholder selectors where possible.

open_editor_btn.description: Button to open the long-form text post editor — a span inside a div, text content '写长文'

new_post_btn.description: Button to start a new post after entering the editor

title_input.description: Title input field — standard input with placeholder, use .fill()

content_editor.description: Main post body — ProseMirror rich text editor. Click to focus, then use page.keyboard.type(). Cannot use .fill().

format_btn.description: Auto-format button — click after typing content body

next_btn.description: Next step button — moves from content editor to description/tags page

description_editor.selector: locator('[data-placeholder="输入正文描述，真诚有价值的分享予人温暖"]')
description_editor.description: Description/tags field on the second page — also ProseMirror. Click to focus, then use page.keyboard.type().

publish_btn.description: Publish button — use getByRole to avoid matching '发布笔记' and '定时发布' which also contain '发布'

comment_textarea.description: Comment input field on the published post page — stable ID selector, use .fill()

comment_send_btn.description: Send button for posting a comment

post_link_FRAGILE.description: FRAGILE — matches empty link text, nth(1) is positional. Used to navigate to published post from profile page. Needs a better approach before using in production.
post_link_FRAGILE.note: XHS opens profile in a new tab (page1) after publishing. Need to find a stable way to identify the most recently published post.

flow: Click 写长文 → Click 新的创作
XHS redirects and opens profile in new tab (page1)
Click comment section → fill comment_textarea → click comment_send_btn
Repeat for each comment in comments array
